title: Enneads IV.8: On the Descent of the Soul
description: Why did the soul descend into the body? Not by compulsion but by a kind of voluntary gravity — to bring light to the lower realms.
introduction: Why did the soul descend into the body? Not by compulsion but by a kind of voluntary gravity — to bring light to the lower realms.

translation.text: The soul's descent is not entirely involuntary. It goes down to bring light to what is below.
